/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libugv_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.so -o rosidl_generator_py/ugv_msgs/libugv_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.so CMakeFiles/ugv_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/ugv_msgs/msg/_man_ctrl_s.c.o CMakeFiles/ugv_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/ugv_msgs/msg/_auto_ctrl_s.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/lev/ngcp_ws/build/ugv_msgs:/opt/ros/humble/lib: /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libpython3.10.so libugv_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so libugv_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
